title: The Lost Little Light
summary: Zulk and Zaya discover a tiny glowing light drifting through Whisperwood. When it seems lost, the siblings work together with patience and kindness to help it find its way home — without keeping it or expecting a reward.
description: Episode 001 of the Whisperwood Universe. A Discovery-framework story proving the flagship duo Zulk and Zaya can carry a gentle adventure alone. One central problem, no villain, no danger. Visual storytelling dominates; dialogue is minimal. The lost little light is a soft wonder of the forest — not a weapon, not unlimited magic, and not a recurring character. Resolution comes through curiosity, empathy, cooperation, and patience.

framework.label: Discovery Framework
framework.notes: Primary framework. Discovery of the light and of how to help; secondary thread of gentle helping without reward.

characters.notes: Notices the light first; suggests paths and leads movement. Learns to pause when Zaya's empathy reveals the light needs patience, not speed.
Senses that the light feels lost; encourages gentle approach. Her magic lantern offers comfort only — it does not capture or solve the problem.

estimatedDuration.notes: Target range 6–8 minutes. Six scenes; visual storytelling with minimal dialogue.

learningGoals.label: helping-without-reward
learningGoals.description: Helping others without expecting a reward — kindness is its own warmth.

learningGoals.label: patience
learningGoals.description: Waiting and paying attention can succeed when rushing cannot.

learningGoals.label: cooperation
learningGoals.description: Different strengths — exploration and empathy — work best together.

emotionalArc.notes: Extended arc: curiosity → wonder → concern → cooperation → hope → joy. Wonder peaks in scenes 001–002; concern in 003; cooperation in 004–005.

storyStructure.beginning: Morning exploration on a familiar forest path. Zulk and Zaya notice a tiny glowing light drifting slowly between the trees — something they have never seen before.
storyStructure.middle: The light wavers and dims; it seems lost. Zulk wants to lead it quickly; Zaya feels it needs gentleness. Together they try, pause, listen, and follow clues the forest offers.
storyStructure.ending: The light finds its way to a sunlit place where it belongs among other soft glows. Zulk and Zaya watch it settle home, smile at each other, and turn toward the path — ready for whatever wonder comes next.

lesson.summary: Helping someone find their way — patiently, kindly, and without asking for anything in return — can be its own happy ending.

productionStatus.notes: Canonical outline and storyboard complete. Awaiting illustration and audio production.

deliverables.notes: Optional adaptation — six spreads aligned to six scenes.

metadata.notes: First official Whisperwood episode. Flagship duo only. Setting described narratively until canonical location records are created.
